notes: Furious Fists (XY3): 10 cards/pack (1 rare-or-better slot + 1 reverse-holo + commons/uncommons + a basic Energy not modeled). Box=36 packs, ETB=8 packs (per Cardcodex ETB page). Rare-slot distribution taken directly from Cardcodex's per-set Furious Fists pull rates, which sum to exactly 100% across the rare slot: Rare 66.7%, Rare Holo 19.6%, Rare Holo EX 8.8%, Ultra Rare (full art / M-EX) 3.9%, Secret Rare 1.0%. This set's buckets have NO separate rare-holo-ex bucket, so Cardcodex's "Rare Holo EX" (8.8%) + "Ultra Rare" (3.9%) are SUMMED into this set's single ultra-rare bucket = 0.127. Cross-checked against Flipside Gaming XY-era averages (EX ~1:6-1:18, full art ~1:12, secret rare rare) and the individual Dragonite-EX page (1:80 packs per card) — all consistent with the Cardcodex aggregate. Per-box expectation: ~7 rare-holo, ~4-5 ultra-rare (EX+FA combined), ~0.36 secret rare (1 secret rare roughly every ~3 packs short of every box, i.e. ~1 per ~2.8 boxes from the 1:102.9 figure). Reverse-holo slot modeled as common/uncommon only (no sourced per-set reverse-holo rare breakdown for XY3); rare cards in the reverse slot are not separately credited to avoid inventing rates. confidence=medium: relies on Cardcodex's per-set community/aggregated estimates rather than a large published opening study, but corroborated across 3 independent sources and internally consistent (rare-slot sums to 1.0).
